title: Tech Horizon
description: Tech Horizon is an old Minecraft styled simple tech mod aimed to provide a similar experience to classic mods like IndustrialCraft 2 and GregTech.
body:
**Tech Horizon** is an old Minecraft styled simple tech mod aimed to provide a similar experience to classic mods like IndustrialCraft 2 and GregTech.
 

WARNING! This mod is in ALPHA version! Bugs and imperfections in the gameplay like poor balancing and exploits are to expect!

 

**It is very recommended to install Just Enough Items (JEI).**

 

 Tech Horizon is all about adding an expansive and practical progression tree featuring all the sorts of fancy machinery you might need in your Minecraft world. It must be said though, this progression tree isn't one that you can easily climb. This mod is moderately resource-heavy. You will want to consider what to make and when to make it. But if you're willing to carry out the challenge you will get:

- FULL JEI support showing you all the possible recipes including fluid crafting and more
- An energy tier system that complicates things, but can be used to your advantage
- A variety of other mechanics like rotation speed to provide a deeper and more explorable experience
- New ways to use and produce all sorts of resources
- Possibility of automation of various resources and actions
- Everything necessary to build your own world full of technology, bit by bit
  
 I hope for your support and I will make sure to constantly update the mod adding new features for you to play with as well as fix things to improve your experience. Hope you enjoy! :D

<sub>MCreator link: https://mcreator.net/modification/114169/tech-horizon<sub>
